summary: Completed frontend testing for Add Lead slide-in panel and Lead Detail Log Activity buttons. All 11 requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Add Lead button opens slide-in panel from RIGHT side (not centered modal) - Panel position x:1440, width:480px
Slide-in panel has CLINIC/COMPANY INFO section with: Company Name, Country dropdown, State/Location, City, Postcode, Company Size, Full Address, Website
Slide-in panel has PERSON IN CHARGE (PIC) section with: PIC Name, Job Title
Slide-in panel has CONTACT DETAILS section with: Mobile Number, Office Number, Fax Number, Email
Slide-in panel has Pipeline Status dropdown with default 'New'
Clicking outside slide-in panel (on overlay) closes the panel
Lead Detail: Task button opens Log Task modal with Task Title, Due Date, Notes fields
Lead Detail: Call button opens Log Call modal with Call Summary, Call Duration dropdown, Notes fields
Lead Detail: WhatsApp button navigates to /whatsapp?leadId={id} with contact pre-selected
Lead Detail: Email button opens Log Email modal with Email Subject, Notes fields
Lead Detail: Meeting button opens Log Meeting modal with Meeting Title, Meeting Date & Time, Notes fields
critical_code_review_comments: SlideInPanel.jsx: Well-implemented with CSS animation 'slideInRight', proper overlay click handling, ESC key close, and body overflow management
LeadDetailPage.jsx: handleLogActivity properly differentiates WhatsApp (navigate) from other activity types (open modal)
Leads.jsx: Correctly uses SlideInPanel for both Add Lead and Edit Lead operations
seed_data_creation: Used existing test lead: Medipro Sdn Bhd (ID: 0d654912-2d92-4104-a2f1-699db80d4620)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) Add Lead now opens slide-in panel from right (480px width, position x:1440), 2) Panel has proper form sections (CLINIC/COMPANY INFO, PIC, CONTACT DETAILS, Pipeline Status), 3) Click outside closes panel, 4) All 5 Log Activity buttons on Lead Detail page functional - Task/Call/Email/Meeting open modals, WhatsApp navigates to /whatsapp?leadId={id}

features_verified.slide_in_panel: Working - Opens from right side with Mac-like side scroll effect
features_verified.panel_sections: Working - All 4 sections present (CLINIC/COMPANY INFO, PIC, CONTACT DETAILS, Pipeline Status)
features_verified.close_on_outside_click: Working - Panel closes when clicking overlay
features_verified.log_task_button: Working - Opens modal with Task Title, Due Date, Notes
features_verified.log_call_button: Working - Opens modal with Call Summary, Call Duration, Notes
features_verified.log_email_button: Working - Opens modal with Email Subject, Notes
features_verified.log_meeting_button: Working - Opens modal with Meeting Title, Date/Time, Notes
